product_overview: NexusChat is a dark-themed internal real-time chat platform with role-based permissions (admin/moderator/participant), rooms, slash commands and Supabase-backed realtime syncing and auth. It prioritises secure DB-enforced access control, smooth message feed scrolling, and subtle animations for demo-ready polish.
core_goals: Provide instant, real-time messaging with history and <500ms cross-tab delivery for demo scenarios
Enforce role-based permissions server-side via Supabase Row Level Security (admin, moderator, participant)
Allow admins to create/delete rooms and manage user roles with realtime updates across clients
Deliver a smooth, polished UX: Lenis smooth scrolling for message feed and anime.js micro-animations
Ship a deployed, demo-ready frontend URL with working authentication and no console errors

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password register and login with persistent Supabase sessions; unauthenticated users are redirected to /login.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill email field with valid email -> Fill password field (>= 8 chars) -> Fill display name -> Click Create Account button -> See success toast "Account created" -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Fill invalid email -> Fill password field -> Click Create Account button -> See inline email format error under email field -> Stay on /register
Navigate to /register -> Fill email that already exists -> Fill password field -> Click Create Account button -> See toast "Account exists. Log in instead." -> Stay on /register
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See session created -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill wrong credentials -> Click Login button -> See toast "Invalid credentials" -> Stay on /login
Navigate to /dashboard without a session -> Redirect to /login -> See toast "Session expired. Please log in again."

features.name: Dashboard & Room Selection
features.description: Authenticated app shell at /dashboard showing header, realtime sidebar room list, user list, and chat panel; room selection loads history and manages realtime subscriptions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard (authenticated) -> See Header, Sidebar with room list, and empty main panel message "Select a room to start chatting" -> Click a room in the sidebar -> See previous realtime subscription cleaned up -> See message history fetch start -> See message list render -> See Lenis smooth-scroll container auto-scroll to bottom

Navigate to /dashboard (authenticated) -> Click a room in the sidebar -> Network error fetching messages occurs -> See toast "Connection failed. Try again." -> Remain in previously selected room or empty state
Navigate to /dashboard (authenticated) -> Click room created recently -> See new room appear in sidebar (realtime) -> Click that room -> See empty state text "No messages yet. Say hello! 👋"

features.name: Real-Time Messaging
features.description: Compose and send messages inside a selected room; messages insert to Supabase and broadcast via realtime subscriptions with anime.js fade-in and Lenis auto-scroll.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard and select a room -> Focus message input at bottom of chat -> Type a non-empty message -> Press Enter or click Send button -> See message appear in local feed with anime.js fade-in -> See Lenis auto-scroll to bottom -> Other connected client receives the message within 500ms
Navigate to /dashboard and select a room -> Focus message input -> Press Enter with empty message -> See input shake animation -> See no message inserted

Navigate to /dashboard in a room -> While realtime is disconnected -> See yellow banner "Reconnecting..." -> Attempt to send message -> See toast error "Connection failed. Try again." or message queued behavior (network-dependent)

features.name: Room Management (Admin)
features.description: Admin-only controls to create and delete rooms via shadcn Dialog and AlertDialog; changes propagate to all users via realtime updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard as admin -> Click + Create Room button in sidebar -> See Create Room dialog open -> Fill room name input -> Click Create button -> See success toast "Room created successfully" -> See new room appear in sidebar for all users via realtime
Navigate to /dashboard as admin -> Click + Create Room button -> Fill room name that already exists -> Click Create button -> See toast "That name already exists." -> Dialog remains open

Navigate to /dashboard as admin -> Click trash icon beside a room -> See AlertDialog confirmation open with message "Delete [Room Name]? All messages will be permanently deleted." -> Click Delete -> See room removed from sidebar for all users -> Users in that room see empty state

Navigate to /dashboard as participant -> Attempt to click + Create Room button (hidden UI) -> Click Manage Users or trash icon not present -> See no admin controls -> If direct API call attempted, RLS blocks action and frontend shows toast "You don't have permission to do this."

features.name: Role Management (Admin)
features.description: Admin Manage Users panel shows profiles with role badges and a dropdown to update roles; role updates are applied via Supabase and reflected in realtime.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard as admin -> Click Manage Users panel -> See list of users with role badges -> Open a user's role dropdown -> Select new role (e.g., moderator) -> Confirm action if required -> See toast "Role updated" -> See user's badge update (pulse animation) for all clients

Navigate to /dashboard as participant -> Attempt to open Manage Users panel (admin-only button not rendered) -> See no access to Manage Users -> If navigating directly to panel route, see redirect to /dashboard or toast "You don't have permission to do this."

features.name: Slash Commands
features.description: Slash command parser detects leading '/' in the input, executes handlers for supported commands, and posts styled system messages to the chat UI (not stored in DB).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard and select a room -> Focus message input -> Type "/help" -> Press Enter -> Frontend detects leading "/" -> Parse command and execute handler -> See styled NexusBot system message listing available commands in chat
Navigate to /dashboard and select a room -> Focus message input -> Type "/rooms" -> Press Enter -> See styled system message listing rooms (derived from current rooms list)

Navigate to /dashboard as moderator -> Focus message input -> Type "/kick @username" -> Press Enter -> Frontend parses command and issues kick handler -> See system message "@username was removed from the room" or similar

Navigate to /dashboard as participant -> Focus message input -> Type "/promote @username" -> Press Enter -> Frontend parses command -> See system message "You don't have permission to use this command."
Navigate to /dashboard -> Type unknown command "/unknown" -> Press Enter -> See system message "Unknown command. Type /help for a list."

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and signup pages for user entry

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main interface for rooms and messaging

features.name: Room Management
features.description: Controls for creating and deleting rooms
